nf:module.nf:name: user_pre_debug
nf:module.nf:description: Sticky pre-user_top debug snapshot registers for only_fifo

nf:register.nf:name: debug_ctrl
nf:register.nf:description: Write bit0 rising edge to clear and arm pre-user_top capture

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_ctrl_pack_0
nf:register.nf:description: Captured ctrl bytes for words 0..3 packed little-endian by word index

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_ctrl_pack_1
nf:register.nf:description: Captured ctrl bytes for words 4..5 packed little-endian by word index

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_word0_hi
nf:register.nf:description: Upper 32 bits of captured pre-user_top word 0

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_word0_lo
nf:register.nf:description: Lower 32 bits of captured pre-user_top word 0

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_word1_hi
nf:register.nf:description: Upper 32 bits of captured pre-user_top word 1

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_word1_lo
nf:register.nf:description: Lower 32 bits of captured pre-user_top word 1

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_word2_hi
nf:register.nf:description: Upper 32 bits of captured pre-user_top word 2

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_word2_lo
nf:register.nf:description: Lower 32 bits of captured pre-user_top word 2

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_word3_hi
nf:register.nf:description: Upper 32 bits of captured pre-user_top word 3

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_word3_lo
nf:register.nf:description: Lower 32 bits of captured pre-user_top word 3

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_word4_hi
nf:register.nf:description: Upper 32 bits of captured pre-user_top word 4

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_word4_lo
nf:register.nf:description: Lower 32 bits of captured pre-user_top word 4

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_word5_hi
nf:register.nf:description: Upper 32 bits of captured pre-user_top word 5

nf:register.nf:name: hw_last_word5_lo
nf:register.nf:description: Lower 32 bits of captured pre-user_top word 5
